package handler

import (
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"net/http"
)

// Positive scenario for gin_handler_mixes_html_json_and_file_responses
// Rule intent: Handlers that serve fundamentally different transport modes from one function.
func PositiveGinHandlerMixesHtmlJsonAndFileResponses(c *gin.Context) {
	format := c.Query("format")

	switch format {
	case "json":
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"data": "json response", "timestamp": 1234567890})
	case "html":
		c.HTML(http.StatusOK, "dashboard.html", gin.H{"title": "Dashboard", "data": "html response"})
	case "file":
		c.File("/tmp/report.csv")
	default:
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "unsupported format"})
	}
}
